name: ADP
description: Human resource information system (HRIS). Monitor employee records, hiring compliance, and workforce data.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ADP Workforce Now as an admin
2. Go to Setup → Developers → Data Connector Credentials
3. Create new credentials (or use existing app credentials)
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Paste both values below

Note: If your organization requires an SSL certificate for API access, contact your ADP admin to configure the credentials without certificate requirement, or use the ADP Marketplace Data Connector setup.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: From your ADP app registration or Data Connector credentials.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: From your ADP app registration or Data Connector credentials.

checks.name: ADP Hiring Compliance
checks.description: Verifies active workers exist with valid employment status.
